name: Make sure the melted butter and milk mixture has cooled slightly before making the dough. If it’s too hot
description: I’ve experienced this many times, the dough will become incredibly sticky like cake batter ). If this happens to you, don’t worry- wait for the dough to cool down before adding more flour, if needed.
